# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  - name: vmName
    type: string
    displayName: VM Name
  - name: osDiskName
    type: string
    displayName: OS Disk Name

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    name: $(vmName)
    location: eastus # Change the location as needed
    properties:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2022-Datacenter
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: $(osDiskName)
        createOption: FromImage
        diskSizeGB: 128
      networkProfile:
        publicIPs:
          - name: $(vmName)PublicIP
            allocationMethod: Dynamic
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: $(vmName)NetworkInterface
            ipConfigurations:
              - name: $(vmName)IPConfig
                publicIPAddress: $(vmName)PublicIP
                subnet:
                  id: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<virtual_network_name>/subnets/<subnet_name> # Update with actual subnet details
